creator: gebhart@secnetix.de
text:
Hi,

On Wed, Oct 13, 2010 at 09:20:31AM +0200, Pietro Cerutti wrote:
> 
> The fact remain that this is a local problem of yours. I cannot
> reproduce it here. I have taken the following steps to make sure that
> nothing is wrong with the tarball / install procedure. I'm open to
> suggestions if you think I missed the point.

In the meantime I and also my former girlfriend installed it on 2 other
completely independent machines and we had the same problem again.
So it's definitely not a local problem of my installations.

Please simply add 
  ${CHMOD} -R +rX ${DATADIR}
as suggest by me in the first place and we could all be happy ;-)


--
